[[Evangelion 2.0 (Translation)|Page 1]], [[Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 2|Page 2]], [[Evangelion 2.0 (Translation) Page 3|Page 3]]



{| cellpadding="6" border="1"
! Timestamp
! Speaker
! Dialogue
|-
| 01:10:43,508 --> 01:10:45,884
| Shinji
| Wh-What is this?
|-
| 01:10:53,593 --> 01:10:55,708
| Shinji
| What are you doing, Father?! 
|-
| 01:10:55,709 --> 01:10:58,984
| Maya
| Control system transfer complete. 
|-
| 01:10:58,985 --> 01:11:05,974
| Operator
| Dummy System has 208 seconds of active time remaining. 
|-
| 01:11:05,975 --> 01:11:09,500
| Gendo
| It doesn't matter. Release the system. Commence the attack.
|-
| 01:11:40,818 --> 01:11:43,319
| Maya
| Is this the power of the Dummy System?
|-
| 01:11:43,819 --> 01:11:44,980
| Tech
| Dummy system nominal.
|-
| 01:11:44,981 --> 01:11:47,050
| Tech
| Control limiters have been rescinded.
|-
| 01:12:54,529 --> 01:13:00,040
| Shinji
| Why, father... Why... What did you do?!
|-
| 01:13:02,213 --> 01:13:06,873
| Shinji
| Damn it! Stop it! Stop, stop, stop, stop...
|-
| 01:13:06,874 --> 01:13:14,905
| Shinji
| Stop, stop, stop, stop...!
|-
| 01:13:16,483 --> 01:13:17,328
| Shinji
| What's that noise?
|-
| 01:13:19,813 --> 01:13:20,313
| Shinji
| Stop, don't...!
|-
| 01:13:23,534 --> 01:13:28,718
| Shinji
| STOP! 
|-
| 01:13:59,322 --> 01:14:00,461
| Misato
| I'm alive?
|-
| 01:14:03,369 --> 01:14:04,065
| Misato
| Kaji?
|-
| 01:14:04,960 --> 01:14:06,670
| Kaji
| Thank goodness, Katsuragi.
|-
| 01:14:07,794 --> 01:14:08,795
| Misato
| How's Ritsuko?
|-
| 01:14:09,417 --> 01:14:12,429
| Kaji
| Don't worry. She's in better shape than you.
|-
| 01:14:13,982 --> 01:14:15,304
| Misato
| I see...
|-
| 01:14:16,576 --> 01:14:18,954
| Misato
| What about Asuka? And Eva Unit-03?
|-
| 01:14:19,023 --> 01:14:23,500
| Kaji
| It was an Angel. Unit-01 destroyed it.
|-
| 01:14:33,950 --> 01:14:36,413
| Maya
| Unit-01's interlocking circuit has been cut.
|-
| 01:14:36,414 --> 01:14:37,414
| Fuyutsuki
| The ejection signal?
|-
| 01:14:37,415 --> 01:14:40,273
| Maya
| It's blocked from inside the plug.
|-
| 01:14:40,274 --> 01:14:41,274
| Aoba
| It's not being accepted.
|-
| 01:14:41,414 --> 01:14:42,275
| Hyuga
| That's enough, Shinji-kun!
|-
| 01:14:43,276 --> 01:14:45,434
| Hyuga  
| If we hadn't done that, you'd be dead! 
|-
| 01:14:45,435 --> 01:14:48,603
| Shinji
| Don't make me more angry by saying such things. 
|-
| 01:14:49,103 --> 01:14:52,103
| Shinji
| Unit-01 has 285 seconds of active time remaining.
|-
| 01:14:52,603 --> 01:14:55,444
| Shinji
| That's enough to destroy half of Headquarters. 
|-
| 01:14:55,445 --> 01:14:57,134
| Aoba
| In his current state, he'll do it, too. 
|-
| 01:14:57,169 --> 01:14:59,472
| Maya
| Shinji-kun, listen to us!
|-
| 01:14:59,473 --> 01:15:03,837
| Maya
| Without Commander Ikari's decision, you would have been killed! 
|-
| 01:15:03,838 --> 01:15:04,838
| Shinji
| I don't care about that.
|-
| 01:15:05,916 --> 01:15:07,187
| Hyuga
| But it's the truth!
|-
| 01:15:07,500 --> 01:15:09,898
| Shinji
| I already said I don't care about that!
|-
| 01:15:10,346 --> 01:15:14,329
| Shinji
| My father... That bastard tried to kill Asuka...
|-
| 01:15:16,235 --> 01:15:17,235
| Shinji
| With my hands!
|-
| 01:15:18,298 --> 01:15:19,438
| Shinji
| Why?!
|-
| 01:15:20,298 --> 01:15:20,798
| Shinji
| Why?!
|-
| 01:15:21,090 --> 01:15:22,843
| Shinji
| Why did you do that?!
|-
| 01:15:22,844 --> 01:15:24,680
| Shinji
| Father, you don't understand anything!
|-
| 01:15:24,681 --> 01:15:28,205
| Shinji
| I believed in you and you made a fool of me!
|-
| 01:15:28,206 --> 01:15:31,187
| Shinji
| Father, you need to lose somebody important, too!
|-
| 01:15:31,188 --> 01:15:32,188
| Shinji
| Then you'll understand what I'm feeling!
|-
| 01:15:33,035 --> 01:15:35,864
| Gendo
| Increase the LCL pressure to maximum.
|-
| 01:15:36,590 --> 01:15:39,392
| Gendo
| We don't have time to waste on a childish tantrum.
|-
| 01:15:40,288 --> 01:15:42,092
| Shinji
| I've still got a direct control cir-
|-
| 01:15:45,550 --> 01:15:50,843
| Shinji
| Damn it... damn it... damn it...
|-
| 01:16:08,609 --> 01:16:13,616
| Rei
| Ikari-kun, you're always listening to that. 
|-
| 01:16:14,587 --> 01:16:17,263
| Shinji
| Yeah. Back then, it used to be my father's.
|-
| 01:16:17,264 --> 01:16:19,212
| Child Shinji
| Just like Ayanami's glasses.
|-
| 01:16:19,213 --> 01:16:21,870
| Shinji
| But then he decided it wasn't needed anymore. 
|-
| 01:16:22,188 --> 01:16:23,491
| Child Shinji
| Just like me. 
|-
| 01:16:23,492 --> 01:16:27,105
| Shinji
| When I lived with my teacher, I'd listen to this all the time, too. 
|-
| 01:16:27,496 --> 01:16:33,268
| Shinji
| I'd close off my ears and my heart so I wouldn't have to deal with this world I hate.
|-
| 01:16:33,269 --> 01:16:34,269
| Rei
| "World you hate"?
|-
| 01:16:35,263 --> 01:16:36,458
| Shinji
| That's right.
|-
| 01:16:36,459 --> 01:16:38,241
| Shinji
| A world with the father I hate.
|-
| 01:16:39,263 --> 01:16:40,824
| Shinji 
| A world with the frightening Angels and Eva.
|-
| 01:16:41,849 --> 01:16:43,417
| Shinji
| A world of suffering and uncertainty.
|-
| 01:16:43,418 --> 01:16:46,066
| Shinji
| A world where father used the Dummy System when I piloted. 
|-
| 01:16:46,067 --> 01:16:49,254
| Shinji
| A world where my friends and I are hurt.
|-
| 01:16:50,840 --> 01:16:54,322
| Shinji
| Even though good things have happened, it all came to nothing in the end.
|-
| 01:16:55,353 --> 01:16:59,180
| Shinji
| That's why I'm rejecting this world I hate.
|-
| 01:17:00,405 --> 01:17:04,494
| Shinji
| I thought Father was protecting me from this world I hate.
|-
| 01:17:04,495 --> 01:17:06,879
| Shinji
| But I was wrong; he used me for his own ends.
|-
| 01:17:07,380 --> 01:17:11,235
| Rei
| Ikari-kun, did you try to understand your father? 
|-
| 01:17:11,236 --> 01:17:12,236
| Shinji
| I tried to understand. 
|-
| 01:17:12,729 --> 01:17:14,852
| Rei
| Nothing happened, did it? 
|-
| 01:17:15,917 --> 01:17:16,816
| Shinji
| I said I tried to understand!
|-
| 01:17:18,272 --> 01:17:19,427
| Shinji
| I hate my father!
|-
| 01:17:19,428 --> 01:17:21,832
| Shinji
| Father abandoned me!
|-
| 01:17:23,238 --> 01:17:25,973
| Child Shinji
| You're going to run away from unpleasant things again.
|-
| 01:17:26,473 --> 01:17:27,809
| Shinji
| What's wrong with that?!
|-
| 01:17:28,665 --> 01:17:31,596
| Shinji
| What's wrong with running away from unpleasant things?!
|-
| 01:17:35,074 --> 01:17:36,211
| Shinji
| Here again...
|-
| 01:17:39,282 --> 01:17:40,694
| Shinji
| I can't take this anymore.
|-
| 01:17:54,605 --> 01:17:58,515
| Ritsuko
| The cellular erosion has dissipated.
|-
| 01:17:58,550 --> 01:18:01,640
| Ritsuko
| We cannot rule out the possibility of mental contamination from the Angel.
|-
| 01:18:01,675 --> 01:18:03,763
| Ritsuko
| It's best she's kept in isolation for the time being.
|-
| 01:18:03,764 --> 01:18:07,108
| Maya
| They're not going to treat her, are they?
|-
| 01:18:07,109 --> 01:18:09,061
| Ritsuko
| Her body is a valuable sample. 
|-
| 01:18:09,062 --> 01:18:11,121
| Ritsuko
| It's impossible. 
|-
| 01:18:13,729 --> 01:18:17,691
| MIB
| Get out, Shinji Ikari. Commander Ikari wants to speak to you.
|-
| 01:18:20,607 --> 01:18:21,972
| Gendo
| Disobeying orders...
|-
| 01:18:21,973 --> 01:18:23,818
| Gendo
| Private appropriation of an Eva...
|-
| 01:18:23,819 --> 01:18:24,819
| Gendo
| Blatant intimidation...
|-
| 01:18:25,205 --> 01:18:27,583
| Gendo
| These are all criminal offenses.
|-
| 01:18:28,084 --> 01:18:30,006
| Gendo
| Do you have anything to say?
|-
| 01:18:30,911 --> 01:18:34,524
| Shinji
| Yes. I no longer wish to pilot Eva. 
|-
| 01:18:34,525 --> 01:18:37,400
| Gendo
| I see. If that's the case, leave. 
|-
| 01:18:39,984 --> 01:18:41,585
| Gendo
| Are you running away again? 
|-
| 01:18:44,539 --> 01:18:50,022
| Gendo
| You want to take responsibility for all the victims. 
|-
| 01:18:50,023 --> 01:18:52,393
| Gendo
| And you don't want what other people give you.
|-
| 01:18:52,894 --> 01:18:55,518
| Gendo
| Shinji, grow up.
|-
| 01:18:56,652 --> 01:19:00,063
| Shinji
| I can't if I don't understand any adults. 
|-
| 01:19:08,907 --> 01:19:09,883
| Gendo
| It's me.
|-
| 01:19:09,884 --> 01:19:12,177
| Gendo
| Erase the Third Boy.
|-
| 01:19:12,178 --> 01:19:15,846
| Gendo
| From now on, Eva Unit-01 will be activated through the Dummy System.
|-
| 01:19:15,847 --> 01:19:17,742
| Gendo
| A backup is unnecessary
|-
| 01:19:19,456 --> 01:19:22,904
| Maya
| We haven't seen Rei since Shinji was detained. 
|-
| 01:19:22,905 --> 01:19:25,520
| Hyuga
| Lately, things have changed from our expectations.
|-
| 01:19:26,461 --> 01:19:28,919
| Hyuga
| There's a feeling of distance between those children. 
|-
| 01:19:28,920 --> 01:19:32,349
| Aoba
| But with this, we're limited to only one pilot. 
|-
| 01:19:32,350 --> 01:19:34,535
| Maya
| I guess we're back to square one. 
|-
| 01:19:42,154 --> 01:19:43,624
| Misato
| I understand how you feel, but...
|-
| 01:19:43,625 --> 01:19:51,032
| Misato
| Your records at Nerv will be deleted. You'll be under constant surveillance, so your activities will be severely restricted.
|-
| 01:19:52,263 --> 01:19:56,890
| Misato
| Don't forget, Suzuhara-kun and Aida-kun left you many messages. 
|-
| 01:19:56,891 --> 01:19:58,331
| Misato
| They're worried about you. 
|-
| 01:19:58,823 --> 01:20:01,278
| Shinji
| It doesn't matter, since I'm leaving. 
|-
| 01:20:02,744 --> 01:20:05,503
| Misato
| You're not going to ask about Rei and Asuka, are you?
|-
| 01:20:08,240 --> 01:20:14,438
| Misato
| The thing is, I guess I tend to be indifferent about humanity and the world.
|-
| 01:20:14,439 --> 01:20:23,083
| Misato
| As a result, this is the first time I've found myself in someone else's position, so I finally understand my late father a little better.
|-
| 01:20:23,084 --> 01:20:30,535
| Misato
| It's simply Nerv doing what's needed. Commander Ikari did what was necessary with you piloting Eva as well.
|-
| 01:20:31,943 --> 01:20:39,871
| Misato
| But, I put my feelings ahead of yours. I feel I understand what a heavy burden you're under.
|-
| 01:20:39,872 --> 01:20:44,208
| Misato
| I know right now you're disappointed with what happened when you piloted Eva. 
|-
| 01:20:44,209 --> 01:20:47,628
| Misato
| But, even if that's the case, you and I-
|-
| 01:20:55,528 --> 01:20:59,518
| Misato
| That day, when Rei called Commander Ikari...
|-
| 01:21:00,343 --> 01:21:03,369
| Misato
| She wanted you and your father to get along. 
|-
| 01:21:04,420 --> 01:21:06,592
| Misato
| She wanted you and your father to smile together. 
|-
| 01:21:07,768 --> 01:21:11,951
| Shinji
| I... have nobody to smile with anymore. 
|-
| 01:21:17,236 --> 01:21:22,986
| PA
| The next stop is Kamigoura, Kamigoura. The exit will be on the left.
|-
| 01:21:25,780 --> 01:21:29,739
| PA
| As of now, the Japanese government has declared a state of emergency.
|-
| 01:21:29,740 --> 01:21:34,871
| PA
| This train will stop at the nearest shelter per evacuation procedures.
|-
| 01:21:34,872 --> 01:21:39,985
| PA
| Please evacuate to the nearest hall once the incline has lowered. 
|-
| 01:21:39,986 --> 01:21:40,986
| Shinji
| It's an Angel.
|-
| 01:21:49,560 --> 01:21:54,080
| Mari
| Come on... Ugh... There we go.
|-
| 01:21:55,132 --> 01:21:58,927
| Mari
| My chest feels really good in this new one!
|-
| 01:22:06,994 --> 01:22:08,442
| Kaworu
| The time has come.
|-
| 01:22:08,443 --> 01:22:12,692
| Operator
| All hands go to Level 1 battle stations. Prepare for surface-to-air interception. 
|-
| 01:22:13,353 --> 01:22:14,151
| Fuyutsuki
| Target's status?
|-
| 01:22:14,152 --> 01:22:15,153
| Aoba
| Right now, it's advancing.
|-
| 01:22:15,653 --> 01:22:17,725
| Aoba
| It just crossed the Old Odawara defense line. 
|-
| 01:22:40,901 --> 01:22:44,582
| Misato
| We don't usually feel the shockwaves here. 
|-
| 01:22:44,583 --> 01:22:46,202
| Operator
| Sector 4 has been hit. Damage unknown. 
|-
| 01:22:46,702 --> 01:22:48,203
| Aoba
| All armor plates have been breached! 
|-
| 01:22:48,703 --> 01:22:51,115
| Hyuga
| All 24 armored layers in a single shot... 
|-
| 01:22:51,615 --> 01:22:57,503
| Fuyutsuki
| The destructive power of the Tenth Angel far exceeds expectations. 
|-
| 01:22:58,972 --> 01:23:00,040
| Misato
| Launch an all-out attack!
|-
| 01:23:00,041 --> 01:23:02,940
| Misato
| Mobilize all of the fortress city's supporting forces!
|-
| 01:23:02,941 --> 01:23:04,715
| Misato
| It's not much, but it'll buy us some time.
|-
| 01:23:08,244 --> 01:23:09,472
| Misato
| Eva Unit-02?!
|-
| 01:23:09,473 --> 01:23:10,473
| Misato
| Who's piloting?
|-
| 01:23:10,974 --> 01:23:14,223
| Hyuga
| Unknown. We did not give a launch order.
|-
| 01:23:27,410 --> 01:23:28,567
| Operator
| Target intact.
|-
| 01:23:28,568 --> 01:23:30,361
| Operator
| Second attack wave had no effect.
|-
| 01:23:30,362 --> 01:23:32,259
| Aoba
| Doesn't matter. Civilian evacuation is the top priority.
|-
| 01:23:32,260 --> 01:23:35,313
| Hyuga
| Guided N2 Mines authorized for third attack wave. 
|-
| 01:23:35,314 --> 01:23:37,649
| Misato
| The Evas can't make it to the surface in time.
|-
| 01:23:37,650 --> 01:23:39,206
| Misato
| Request assistance from Europe.
|-
| 01:23:39,207 --> 01:23:41,010
| Misato
| Position Unit-02 inside the GeoFront!
|-
| 01:23:41,011 --> 01:23:41,385
| Misato
| Status of Unit-00?
|-
| 01:23:41,885 --> 01:23:44,130
| Maya
| The left arm is still critical! It can barely launch!
|-
| 01:23:44,630 --> 01:23:46,986
| Misato
| Once that's done, send it in as cover for Unit-02!
|-
| 01:23:46,987 --> 01:23:48,012
| Misato
| It's too dangerous to be out there alone.
|-
| 01:23:48,013 --> 01:23:48,937
| Hyuga
| Roger.
|-
| 01:23:48,938 --> 01:23:49,938
| Misato
| Status of Unit-01?
|-
| 01:23:49,939 --> 01:23:51,843
| Ritsuko
| It's being configured for the Dummy System.
|-
| 01:23:52,174 --> 01:23:53,648
| Misato
| Make it quick!
|-
| 01:23:57,367 --> 01:24:00,370
| Man
| All of the evacuees are moving into the GeoFront. 
|-
| 01:24:00,371 --> 01:24:04,133
| Man
| They say it's the safest place in the world. 
|-
| 01:24:10,134 --> 01:24:12,472
| Aoba
| Target has entered the GeoFront!
|-
| 01:24:12,473 --> 01:24:13,473
| Hyuga
| Eva Unit-02, engaging combat!
|-
| 01:24:13,474 --> 01:24:15,157
| Misato
| Do we have communication with Unit-02? 
|-
| 01:24:15,158 --> 01:24:17,236
| Maya
| The link has been cut.
|-
| 01:24:18,551 --> 01:24:19,665
| Maya
| That means-
|-
| 01:24:20,705 --> 01:24:22,539
| Misato
| So, whoever it is wants to go it alone. 
|-
| 01:24:29,256 --> 01:24:31,384
| Mari
| What a wonderful smell...
|-
| 01:24:31,385 --> 01:24:34,221
| Mari
| Even someone else's Eva doesn't smell bad.
|-
| 01:24:35,087 --> 01:24:41,143
| Mari
| If I don't attack it swiftly and finish it as soon as it passes the 5th Defense Line, Headquarters will be toast!
|-
| 01:24:58,187 --> 01:24:59,979
| Mari
| This A.T. Field is really strong!
|-
| 01:24:59,980 --> 01:25:02,609
| Mari
| I'm not accomplishing a thing here!
|-
| 01:25:07,488 --> 01:25:09,593
| Mari
| Let's see how you like this!
|-
| 01:25:21,757 --> 01:25:23,125
| Mari
| Point-blank attack!
|-
| 01:25:39,125 --> 01:25:41,773
| Mari
| Bastard, what are you...
|-
| 01:25:41,774 --> 01:25:43,754
| Operator
| Dummy System connections complete.
|-
| 01:25:43,755 --> 01:25:45,051
| Ritsuko
| Start contact.
|-
| 01:25:45,052 --> 01:25:46,052
| Maya
| Yes ma'am!
|-
| 01:25:46,505 --> 01:25:47,053
| Ritsuko
| What's happening?!
|-
| 01:25:47,254 --> 01:25:48,772
| Maya
| The core unit is refusing the Dummy! 
|-
| 01:25:49,272 --> 01:25:52,602
| Maya
| It's no use! Eva Unit-01 won't activate!
|-
| 01:25:54,603 --> 01:25:56,454
| Fuyutsuki
| It's refusing the Dummy?
|-
| 01:25:56,454 --> 01:26:00,883
| Gendo
| Fuyutsuki... I'll leave things to you for a while.
|-
| 01:26:01,448 --> 01:26:06,096
| Mari 
| Damn, I'm not gonna win at this rate... 
|-
| 01:26:06,202 --> 01:26:09,194
| Mari
| Alright! Let's give it a trial run. 
|-
| 01:26:09,946 --> 01:26:13,296
| Mari
| We'll show you the power of an Eva that's abandoned its humanity.
|-
| 01:26:13,297 --> 01:26:17,965
| Mari
| Invert mode. Secret code, "The Beast"!
|-
| 01:26:29,177 --> 01:26:31,785
| Mari
| Hang in there, Eva Unit-02...
|-
| 01:26:32,747 --> 01:26:34,378
| Mari
| I'll suffer with you!
|-
| 01:26:39,301 --> 01:26:40,683
| Hyuga
| To think the Eva had a function like this...
|-
| 01:26:40,684 --> 01:26:42,503
| Maya
| The limiters are being released!
|-
| 01:26:42,504 --> 01:26:43,892
| Maya
| Everything is outside norms!
|-
| 01:26:43,893 --> 01:26:46,660
| Maya
| Unable to monitor the plug interior! But... 
|-
| 01:26:46,661 --> 01:26:51,043
| Ritsuko
| The plug depth may have reached negative values because she's willing to enter the contamination zone.
|-
| 01:26:51,044 --> 01:26:53,049
| Maya
| No good! It's too dangerous!
|-
| 01:26:53,821 --> 01:27:01,411
| Mari
| Nothing... ventured... Nothing... 
|-
| 01:27:03,384 --> 01:27:04,676
| Mari
| Gained!
|-
|2.22 ADDITION: 1:28:50 (Mari upside down, she says a few things) 
|Upside down Mari in Eva-02 powers activate!	
|ADD LINES ACCORDINGLY! 
|-
| 01:27:56,639 --> 01:28:02,316
| Ritsuko
| Despite shedding its humanity, and being specialized for combat, the Eva's Second Beast configuration is losing the fight...
|-
| 01:28:02,351 --> 01:28:04,874
| Ritsuko
| This is as far as we can go. 
|-
| 01:28:06,035 --> 01:28:07,194
| Misato
| Unit-00?
|-
| 01:28:07,695 --> 01:28:08,195
| Misato
| Without a rifle?
|-
| 01:28:12,288 --> 01:28:13,197
| Ritsuko
| It can't be...!
|-
| 01:28:13,198 --> 01:28:15,588
| Misato
| Rei, stop! Rei!
|-
| 01:28:20,553 --> 01:28:22,380
| Rei
| A.T. Field at maximum! 
|-
| 01:28:25,400 --> 01:28:31,300
| Rei
| Even if Ikari-kun won't pilot Eva, it's alright!
|-
| 01:28:31,301 --> 01:28:32,087
| Rei
| Therefore...
|-
| 01:28:44,554 --> 01:28:47,613
| Misato
| The A.T. Field won't break from a single Eva!
|-
| 01:28:54,760 --> 01:28:59,218
| Mari
| Unit-02... This is it!
|-
| 01:29:01,778 --> 01:29:03,817
| Mari
| This is the last one!
|-
| 01:29:12,000 --> 01:29:13,740
| Rei
| Pilot of Unit-02, escape!
|-
| 01:29:14,241 --> 01:29:15,194
| Rei
| Thank you...
|-
| 01:29:27,524 --> 01:29:28,817
| Hyuga
| Unit-00 is...
|-
| 01:29:43,365 --> 01:29:51,949
| Tech
| This shelter has been designated as a hazardous zone. Please evacuate to the nearest safe zone. I repeat...
|-
| 01:30:00,792 --> 01:30:06,042
| Mari
| Ouch... I almost died out there.
|-
| 01:30:07,203 --> 01:30:09,936
| Mari
| Ah? What are you doing here?
|-
| 01:30:09,971 --> 01:30:15,213
| Mari
| I was wondering why we're one unit short. I guess I know now.
|-
| 01:30:16,944 --> 01:30:19,829
| Shinji
| I... I've decided I'm no longer a pilot.
|-
| 01:30:21,460 --> 01:30:26,232
| Mari
| So there's another person who worries whether to pilot Eva.
|-
| 01:30:26,233 --> 01:30:29,951
| Mari
| Then hurry up and run away from here.
|-
| 01:30:29,960 --> 01:30:32,785
| Mari
| Here, I'll give you a hand.
|-
| 01:30:36,961 --> 01:30:41,696
| Shinji
| I'm not going to pilot, I'm not going to pilot, I'm not going to pilot...
|-
| 01:30:42,112 --> 01:30:47,553
| Mari
| You know, if you continue to be so hard on yourself, you won't have any fun.
|-
| 01:31:30,134 --> 01:31:34,607
| Ritsuko
| It can't be... It's impossible for an Angel to swallow Eva!
|-
| 01:31:34,641 --> 01:31:38,912
| Maya
| That's strange. The target's identification signal now matches Unit-00's!
|-
| 01:31:38,913 --> 01:31:42,875
| Misato
| It's over now. If the Angel invades Central Dogma, it won't even self-destruct!
|-
| 01:31:43,375 --> 01:31:44,916
| Misato
| It will reach Lilith easily!
|-
| 01:31:44,917 --> 01:31:51,431
| Mari
| It's fusing with Unit-00. It even fused with the pilot.
|-
| 01:31:51,958 --> 01:31:56,991
| Mari
| You're going to die too. Hurry up and escape!
|-
| 01:32:07,293 --> 01:32:10,660
| Mari
| Oh, did he leave?
|-
| 01:32:34,008 --> 01:32:35,500
| Tech
| Headquarters' ground facilities, destroyed!
|-
| 01:32:35,500 --> 01:32:36,700
| Tech
| Direct hit on the third foundation!
|-
| 01:32:36,700 --> 01:32:38,370
| Hyuga
| Final armor plating, destroyed!
|-
| 01:32:38,374 --> 01:32:40,473
| Misato
| It's no good! The main shaft is completely exposed!
|-
| 01:32:41,883 --> 01:32:43,009
| Ritsuko
| Unit-01's not ready?
|-
| 01:32:47,038 --> 01:32:48,135
| Tech
| Plug position is not fixed.
|-
| 01:32:48,136 --> 01:32:50,139
| Tech
| Dummy System is not connected.
|-
| 01:32:50,140 --> 01:32:51,140
| Tech
| We can't reset!
|-
| 01:32:51,141 --> 01:32:54,605
| Gendo
| Keep trying. Restart the list from 308.
|-
| 01:32:54,606 --> 01:32:57,970
| Tech
| List 308, begin checking.
|-
| 01:32:56,640 --> 01:33:01,290
| Gendo
| Why... Why are you doing this to me, Yui? 
|-
| 01:33:01,006 --> 01:33:02,006
| Shinji
| Please wait!
|-
| 01:33:03,455 --> 01:33:08,455
| Shinji
| Let me... Please let me pilot Unit-01!
|-
| 01:33:12,775 --> 01:33:14,728
| Gendo
| Why are you here?
|-
| 01:33:16,904 --> 01:33:23,813
| Shinji
| Father! I am the pilot of Evangelion Unit-01, Shinji Ikari!
|-
| 01:33:27,600 --> 01:33:30,389
| Aoba
| Target has descended the first seven layers of Terminal Dogma! 
|-
| 01:33:32,455 --> 01:33:35,026
| Misato
| It's coming here! All noncombatants, evacuate!
|-
| 01:33:35,070 --> 01:33:39,690
| Tech
| All noncombatants, evacuate immediately. I repeat...
All noncombatants, evacuate immediately.
|-
| 01:33:50,985 --> 01:33:52,423
| Misato
| Eva Unit-01!
|-
| 01:33:53,194 --> 01:33:54,253
| Misato
| Shinji-kun!
|-
| 01:34:17,222 --> 01:34:17,722
| Shinji
| Misato-san!
|-
| 01:34:17,723 --> 01:34:19,882
| Misato
| Release all fixed locks!
|-
| 01:34:47,701 --> 01:34:48,702
| Shinji
| Out of energy?
|-
| 01:34:49,202 --> 01:34:51,128
| Maya
| Unit-01 has reached active time limit!
|-
| 01:34:51,129 --> 01:34:52,129
| Maya
| The reserves are depleted! 
|-
| 01:34:52,130 --> 01:34:53,130
| Misato
| Shinji-kun!
|-
| 01:35:10,082 --> 01:35:10,582
| Misato
| Shinji-kun!
|-
| 01:35:16,419 --> 01:35:20,584
| Shinji
| Give me back... Ayanami!
|-
| 01:35:23,832 --> 01:35:28,550
| Maya
| It's starting up, even though it should be at its active limit...
|-
| 01:35:30,231 --> 01:35:31,287
| Misato
| Berserk?
|-
| 01:35:31,288 --> 01:35:32,498
| Ritsuko
| I don't know... 
|-
| 01:35:32,499 --> 01:35:35,938
| Ritsuko
| I have no idea what is happening to Unit-01.
|-
| 01:36:21,365 --> 01:36:23,430
| Misato
| An Eva with this kind of power...
|-
| 01:36:23,431 --> 01:36:26,751
| Ritsuko
| Unit-01 is beyond our ability to control.
|-
| 01:36:26,752 --> 01:36:29,441
| Maya
| Plug depth is over 180!
|-
| 01:36:29,476 --> 01:36:30,745
| Maya
| Any further increase is dangerous!
|-
| 01:36:30,746 --> 01:36:34,077
| Ritsuko
| Shinji-kun, stop! You won't be able to return to human form!
|-
| 01:36:34,817 --> 01:36:39,534
| Shinji
| I don't care what happens to me. I don't care what happens to the world.
|-
| 01:36:39,535 --> 01:36:42,050
| Shinji
| But at least Ayanami...
|-
| 01:36:42,051 --> 01:36:46,450
| Shinji
| At least I will save Ayanami!
|-
| 01:37:00,116 --> 01:37:01,023
| Misato
| Go for it, Shinji-kun!
|-
| 01:37:01,028 --> 01:37:01,985
| Ritsuko
| Misato?!
|-
| 01:37:03,529 --> 01:37:05,278
| Misato
| Don't do this for someone else!
|-
| 01:37:06,275 --> 01:37:08,766
| Misato
| Do this for your own desires!
|-
| 01:37:19,996 --> 01:37:21,907
| Shinji
| Ayanami, where are you?
|-
| 01:37:23,244 --> 01:37:25,244
| Rei
| It's useless. 
|-
| 01:37:25,245 --> 01:37:28,667
| Rei
| I can only live here.
|-
| 01:37:28,668 --> 01:37:29,411
| Shinji
| Ayanami?
|-
| 01:37:29,412 --> 01:37:31,780
| Rei
| It's alright, Ikari-kun.
|-
| 01:37:31,900 --> 01:37:34,440
| Rei
| Even if I die, I can be replaced.
|-
| 01:37:34.441 --> 01:37:35,630
| Rei clones
| <i>I can be replaced...</i>
|-
| 01:37:35,659 --> 01:37:38,616
| Shinji
| No! There's no other Ayanami but you!
|-
| 01:37:39,312 --> 01:37:41,312
| Shinji
| That's why I will save you!
|-
| 01:38:00,350 --> 01:38:05,425
| Maya
| No, the shape control limiter is going out. Unable to analyze!
|-
| 01:38:05,426 --> 01:38:10,648
| Ritsuko
| Eva is returning to its original form, no longer confined by man.
|-
| 01:38:10,649 --> 01:38:16,527
| Ritsuko
| Eva has thrown off the curse we had placed on it, and is becoming a superhuman being close to God. 
|-
| 01:38:16,528 --> 01:38:22,222
| Ritsuko
| It's transforming into an energy-condenser, spinning all of Heaven and Earth,
|-
| 01:38:22,223 --> 01:38:26,365
| Ritsuko
| all living creatures into it's accompanying giant wave.
|-
| 01:38:28,061 --> 01:38:33,160
| Ritsuko
| To grant the wishes of a person--that was Eva's only purpose...
|-
| 01:39:01,701 --> 01:39:03,231
| Shinji
| Ayanami!
|-
| 01:39:20,700 --> 01:39:22,340
| Shinji
| Ayanami!
|-
| 01:39:42,990 --> 01:39:45,730
| Shinji
| Ayanami! Take my hand!
|-
| 01:39:49,600 --> 01:39:51,120
| Shinji
| Come on!
|-
| 01:40:24,486 --> 01:40:29,977
| Kaji
| Triggering Unit-01's awakening before the rest are present...
|-
| 01:40:29,978 --> 01:40:34,406
| Kaji
| Commander Ikari, Seele won't keep quiet about this.
|-
| 01:40:34,407 --> 01:40:39,525
| Fuyutsuki
| As we thought, with those two the awakening of Unit-01 is complete.
|-
| 01:40:39,526 --> 01:40:45,273
| Gendo
| Indeed. Soon we will consummate our covenant.
|-                                   
| 01:40:48,710 --> 01:40:53,648      
| Shinji
| Ayanami, about my father..., thank you.
|-
| 01:40:53,649 --> 01:40:58,062
| Rei
| I'm sorry I couldn't do anything.
|-
| 01:40:58,063 --> 01:40:59,830
| Shinji
| It doesn't matter anymore.
|-
| 01:41:01,718 --> 01:41:03,045
| Shinji
| It's alright like this.
|-
| 01:41:10,790 --> 01:41:16,080
| Mari
| Ah, I see. He saved us in the nick of time.
|-
| 01:41:16,081 --> 01:41:20,327
| Mari
| I knew he smelled different. 
|-
| 01:41:52,617 --> 01:42:02,373
| Ritsuko
| A new lifeform has been born that transcends all reason, at the cost of destroying the life that came before.
|-
| 01:42:06,151 --> 01:42:11,017
| Misato
| Those wings... Just like 15 years ago!
|-
| 01:42:12,469 --> 01:42:16,174
| Ritsuko
| Yes. The continuation of Second Impact...
|-
| 01:42:16,175 --> 01:42:17,175
| Ritsuko
| Third Impact has begun!
|-
| 01:42:19,035 --> 01:42:21,282
| Ritsuko
| Soon the world will end.
|-
| 01:47:40,132 --> 01:47:41,997
| Misato
| What the hell was that?
|-
| 01:47:46,376 --> 01:47:50,304
| Kaworu
| Come now, the promised time has come, Ikari Shinji-kun.
|-
| 01:47:51,043 --> 01:47:56,240
| Kaworu
| This time, I'll be sure to bring you happiness.
|-
| 01:48:00,222 --> 01:48:02,943
| Misato
| The frozen Eva Unit-01 with Rei and Shinji still absorbed.
|-
| 01:48:02,944 --> 01:48:04,541
| Misato
| The fortress city abandoned. 
|-
| 01:48:04,542 --> 01:48:06,035
| Misato
| Nerv personnel held in confinement.
|-
| 01:48:06,036 --> 01:48:08,722
| Misato
| Eva Unit-06 descends on Dogma. 
|-
| 01:48:08,723 --> 01:48:10,488
| Misato
| The quickening Eva Unit-08 and its pilot. 
|-
| 01:48:12,219 --> 01:48:14,435
| Misato
| And the children chosen by fate finally assemble. 
|-
| 01:48:14,436 --> 01:48:18,852
| Misato
| Where will this tale of people yearning for life continue to go?
|-
| 01:48:18,853 --> 01:48:21,962
| Misato
| Next time, Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: Q
|-
| 01:48:21,963 --> 01:48:25,182
| Misato
| I'll give you plenty more fan service next time, too!
|}


[[Category:Translations]]
html:
This is a work in progress. Do not redistribute this translation without the consent of the translators.

Page 1, Page 2, Page 3


Timestamp Speaker Dialogue
01:10:43,508 --> 01:10:45,884 Shinji Wh-What is this?
01:10:53,593 --> 01:10:55,708 Shinji What are you doing, Father?!
01:10:55,709 --> 01:10:58,984 Maya Control system transfer complete.
01:10:58,985 --> 01:11:05,974 Operator Dummy System has 208 seconds of active time remaining.
01:11:05,975 --> 01:11:09,500 Gendo It doesn't matter. Release the system. Commence the attack.
01:11:40,818 --> 01:11:43,319 Maya Is this the power of the Dummy System?
01:11:43,819 --> 01:11:44,980 Tech Dummy system nominal.
01:11:44,981 --> 01:11:47,050 Tech Control limiters have been rescinded.
01:12:54,529 --> 01:13:00,040 Shinji Why, father... Why... What did you do?!
01:13:02,213 --> 01:13:06,873 Shinji Damn it! Stop it! Stop, stop, stop, stop...
01:13:06,874 --> 01:13:14,905 Shinji Stop, stop, stop, stop...!
01:13:16,483 --> 01:13:17,328 Shinji What's that noise?
01:13:19,813 --> 01:13:20,313 Shinji Stop, don't...!
01:13:23,534 --> 01:13:28,718 Shinji STOP!
01:13:59,322 --> 01:14:00,461 Misato I'm alive?
01:14:03,369 --> 01:14:04,065 Misato Kaji?
01:14:04,960 --> 01:14:06,670 Kaji Thank goodness, Katsuragi.
01:14:07,794 --> 01:14:08,795 Misato How's Ritsuko?
01:14:09,417 --> 01:14:12,429 Kaji Don't worry. She's in better shape than you.
01:14:13,982 --> 01:14:15,304 Misato I see...
01:14:16,576 --> 01:14:18,954 Misato What about Asuka? And Eva Unit-03?
01:14:19,023 --> 01:14:23,500 Kaji It was an Angel. Unit-01 destroyed it.
01:14:33,950 --> 01:14:36,413 Maya Unit-01's interlocking circuit has been cut.
01:14:36,414 --> 01:14:37,414 Fuyutsuki The ejection signal?
01:14:37,415 --> 01:14:40,273 Maya It's blocked from inside the plug.
01:14:40,274 --> 01:14:41,274 Aoba It's not being accepted.
01:14:41,414 --> 01:14:42,275 Hyuga That's enough, Shinji-kun!
01:14:43,276 --> 01:14:45,434 Hyuga If we hadn't done that, you'd be dead!
01:14:45,435 --> 01:14:48,603 Shinji Don't make me more angry by saying such things.
01:14:49,103 --> 01:14:52,103 Shinji Unit-01 has 285 seconds of active time remaining.
01:14:52,603 --> 01:14:55,444 Shinji That's enough to destroy half of Headquarters.
01:14:55,445 --> 01:14:57,134 Aoba In his current state, he'll do it, too.
01:14:57,169 --> 01:14:59,472 Maya Shinji-kun, listen to us!
01:14:59,473 --> 01:15:03,837 Maya Without Commander Ikari's decision, you would have been killed!
01:15:03,838 --> 01:15:04,838 Shinji I don't care about that.
01:15:05,916 --> 01:15:07,187 Hyuga But it's the truth!
01:15:07,500 --> 01:15:09,898 Shinji I already said I don't care about that!
01:15:10,346 --> 01:15:14,329 Shinji My father... That bastard tried to kill Asuka...
01:15:16,235 --> 01:15:17,235 Shinji With my hands!
01:15:18,298 --> 01:15:19,438 Shinji Why?!
01:15:20,298 --> 01:15:20,798 Shinji Why?!
01:15:21,090 --> 01:15:22,843 Shinji Why did you do that?!
01:15:22,844 --> 01:15:24,680 Shinji Father, you don't understand anything!
01:15:24,681 --> 01:15:28,205 Shinji I believed in you and you made a fool of me!
01:15:28,206 --> 01:15:31,187 Shinji Father, you need to lose somebody important, too!
01:15:31,188 --> 01:15:32,188 Shinji Then you'll understand what I'm feeling!
01:15:33,035 --> 01:15:35,864 Gendo Increase the LCL pressure to maximum.
01:15:36,590 --> 01:15:39,392 Gendo We don't have time to waste on a childish tantrum.
01:15:40,288 --> 01:15:42,092 Shinji I've still got a direct control cir-
01:15:45,550 --> 01:15:50,843 Shinji Damn it... damn it... damn it...
01:16:08,609 --> 01:16:13,616 Rei Ikari-kun, you're always listening to that.
01:16:14,587 --> 01:16:17,263 Shinji Yeah. Back then, it used to be my father's.
01:16:17,264 --> 01:16:19,212 Child Shinji Just like Ayanami's glasses.
01:16:19,213 --> 01:16:21,870 Shinji But then he decided it wasn't needed anymore.
01:16:22,188 --> 01:16:23,491 Child Shinji Just like me.
01:16:23,492 --> 01:16:27,105 Shinji When I lived with my teacher, I'd listen to this all the time, too.
01:16:27,496 --> 01:16:33,268 Shinji I'd close off my ears and my heart so I wouldn't have to deal with this world I hate.
01:16:33,269 --> 01:16:34,269 Rei "World you hate"?
01:16:35,263 --> 01:16:36,458 Shinji That's right.
01:16:36,459 --> 01:16:38,241 Shinji A world with the father I hate.
01:16:39,263 --> 01:16:40,824 Shinji A world with the frightening Angels and Eva.
01:16:41,849 --> 01:16:43,417 Shinji A world of suffering and uncertainty.
01:16:43,418 --> 01:16:46,066 Shinji A world where father used the Dummy System when I piloted.
01:16:46,067 --> 01:16:49,254 Shinji A world where my friends and I are hurt.
01:16:50,840 --> 01:16:54,322 Shinji Even though good things have happened, it all came to nothing in the end.
01:16:55,353 --> 01:16:59,180 Shinji That's why I'm rejecting this world I hate.
01:17:00,405 --> 01:17:04,494 Shinji I thought Father was protecting me from this world I hate.
01:17:04,495 --> 01:17:06,879 Shinji But I was wrong; he used me for his own ends.
01:17:07,380 --> 01:17:11,235 Rei Ikari-kun, did you try to understand your father?
01:17:11,236 --> 01:17:12,236 Shinji I tried to understand.
01:17:12,729 --> 01:17:14,852 Rei Nothing happened, did it?
01:17:15,917 --> 01:17:16,816 Shinji I said I tried to understand!
01:17:18,272 --> 01:17:19,427 Shinji I hate my father!
01:17:19,428 --> 01:17:21,832 Shinji Father abandoned me!
01:17:23,238 --> 01:17:25,973 Child Shinji You're going to run away from unpleasant things again.
01:17:26,473 --> 01:17:27,809 Shinji What's wrong with that?!
01:17:28,665 --> 01:17:31,596 Shinji What's wrong with running away from unpleasant things?!
01:17:35,074 --> 01:17:36,211 Shinji Here again...
01:17:39,282 --> 01:17:40,694 Shinji I can't take this anymore.
01:17:54,605 --> 01:17:58,515 Ritsuko The cellular erosion has dissipated.
01:17:58,550 --> 01:18:01,640 Ritsuko We cannot rule out the possibility of mental contamination from the Angel.
01:18:01,675 --> 01:18:03,763 Ritsuko It's best she's kept in isolation for the time being.
01:18:03,764 --> 01:18:07,108 Maya They're not going to treat her, are they?
01:18:07,109 --> 01:18:09,061 Ritsuko Her body is a valuable sample.
01:18:09,062 --> 01:18:11,121 Ritsuko It's impossible.
01:18:13,729 --> 01:18:17,691 MIB Get out, Shinji Ikari. Commander Ikari wants to speak to you.
01:18:20,607 --> 01:18:21,972 Gendo Disobeying orders...
01:18:21,973 --> 01:18:23,818 Gendo Private appropriation of an Eva...
01:18:23,819 --> 01:18:24,819 Gendo Blatant intimidation...
01:18:25,205 --> 01:18:27,583 Gendo These are all criminal offenses.
01:18:28,084 --> 01:18:30,006 Gendo Do you have anything to say?
01:18:30,911 --> 01:18:34,524 Shinji Yes. I no longer wish to pilot Eva.
01:18:34,525 --> 01:18:37,400 Gendo I see. If that's the case, leave.
01:18:39,984 --> 01:18:41,585 Gendo Are you running away again?
01:18:44,539 --> 01:18:50,022 Gendo You want to take responsibility for all the victims.
01:18:50,023 --> 01:18:52,393 Gendo And you don't want what other people give you.
01:18:52,894 --> 01:18:55,518 Gendo Shinji, grow up.
01:18:56,652 --> 01:19:00,063 Shinji I can't if I don't understand any adults.
01:19:08,907 --> 01:19:09,883 Gendo It's me.
01:19:09,884 --> 01:19:12,177 Gendo Erase the Third Boy.
01:19:12,178 --> 01:19:15,846 Gendo From now on, Eva Unit-01 will be activated through the Dummy System.
01:19:15,847 --> 01:19:17,742 Gendo A backup is unnecessary
01:19:19,456 --> 01:19:22,904 Maya We haven't seen Rei since Shinji was detained.
01:19:22,905 --> 01:19:25,520 Hyuga Lately, things have changed from our expectations.
01:19:26,461 --> 01:19:28,919 Hyuga There's a feeling of distance between those children.
01:19:28,920 --> 01:19:32,349 Aoba But with this, we're limited to only one pilot.
01:19:32,350 --> 01:19:34,535 Maya I guess we're back to square one.
01:19:42,154 --> 01:19:43,624 Misato I understand how you feel, but...
01:19:43,625 --> 01:19:51,032 Misato Your records at Nerv will be deleted. You'll be under constant surveillance, so your activities will be severely restricted.
01:19:52,263 --> 01:19:56,890 Misato Don't forget, Suzuhara-kun and Aida-kun left you many messages.
01:19:56,891 --> 01:19:58,331 Misato They're worried about you.
01:19:58,823 --> 01:20:01,278 Shinji It doesn't matter, since I'm leaving.
01:20:02,744 --> 01:20:05,503 Misato You're not going to ask about Rei and Asuka, are you?
01:20:08,240 --> 01:20:14,438 Misato The thing is, I guess I tend to be indifferent about humanity and the world.
01:20:14,439 --> 01:20:23,083 Misato As a result, this is the first time I've found myself in someone else's position, so I finally understand my late father a little better.
01:20:23,084 --> 01:20:30,535 Misato It's simply Nerv doing what's needed. Commander Ikari did what was necessary with you piloting Eva as well.
01:20:31,943 --> 01:20:39,871 Misato But, I put my feelings ahead of yours. I feel I understand what a heavy burden you're under.
01:20:39,872 --> 01:20:44,208 Misato I know right now you're disappointed with what happened when you piloted Eva.
01:20:44,209 --> 01:20:47,628 Misato But, even if that's the case, you and I-
01:20:55,528 --> 01:20:59,518 Misato That day, when Rei called Commander Ikari...
01:21:00,343 --> 01:21:03,369 Misato She wanted you and your father to get along.
01:21:04,420 --> 01:21:06,592 Misato She wanted you and your father to smile together.
01:21:07,768 --> 01:21:11,951 Shinji I... have nobody to smile with anymore.
01:21:17,236 --> 01:21:22,986 PA The next stop is Kamigoura, Kamigoura. The exit will be on the left.
01:21:25,780 --> 01:21:29,739 PA As of now, the Japanese government has declared a state of emergency.
01:21:29,740 --> 01:21:34,871 PA This train will stop at the nearest shelter per evacuation procedures.
01:21:34,872 --> 01:21:39,985 PA Please evacuate to the nearest hall once the incline has lowered.
01:21:39,986 --> 01:21:40,986 Shinji It's an Angel.
01:21:49,560 --> 01:21:54,080 Mari Come on... Ugh... There we go.
01:21:55,132 --> 01:21:58,927 Mari My chest feels really good in this new one!
01:22:06,994 --> 01:22:08,442 Kaworu The time has come.
01:22:08,443 --> 01:22:12,692 Operator All hands go to Level 1 battle stations. Prepare for surface-to-air interception.
01:22:13,353 --> 01:22:14,151 Fuyutsuki Target's status?
01:22:14,152 --> 01:22:15,153 Aoba Right now, it's advancing.
01:22:15,653 --> 01:22:17,725 Aoba It just crossed the Old Odawara defense line.
01:22:40,901 --> 01:22:44,582 Misato We don't usually feel the shockwaves here.
01:22:44,583 --> 01:22:46,202 Operator Sector 4 has been hit. Damage unknown.
01:22:46,702 --> 01:22:48,203 Aoba All armor plates have been breached!
01:22:48,703 --> 01:22:51,115 Hyuga All 24 armored layers in a single shot...
01:22:51,615 --> 01:22:57,503 Fuyutsuki The destructive power of the Tenth Angel far exceeds expectations.
01:22:58,972 --> 01:23:00,040 Misato Launch an all-out attack!
01:23:00,041 --> 01:23:02,940 Misato Mobilize all of the fortress city's supporting forces!
01:23:02,941 --> 01:23:04,715 Misato It's not much, but it'll buy us some time.
01:23:08,244 --> 01:23:09,472 Misato Eva Unit-02?!
01:23:09,473 --> 01:23:10,473 Misato Who's piloting?
01:23:10,974 --> 01:23:14,223 Hyuga Unknown. We did not give a launch order.
01:23:27,410 --> 01:23:28,567 Operator Target intact.
01:23:28,568 --> 01:23:30,361 Operator Second attack wave had no effect.
01:23:30,362 --> 01:23:32,259 Aoba Doesn't matter. Civilian evacuation is the top priority.
01:23:32,260 --> 01:23:35,313 Hyuga Guided N2 Mines authorized for third attack wave.
01:23:35,314 --> 01:23:37,649 Misato The Evas can't make it to the surface in time.
01:23:37,650 --> 01:23:39,206 Misato Request assistance from Europe.
01:23:39,207 --> 01:23:41,010 Misato Position Unit-02 inside the GeoFront!
01:23:41,011 --> 01:23:41,385 Misato Status of Unit-00?
01:23:41,885 --> 01:23:44,130 Maya The left arm is still critical! It can barely launch!
01:23:44,630 --> 01:23:46,986 Misato Once that's done, send it in as cover for Unit-02!
01:23:46,987 --> 01:23:48,012 Misato It's too dangerous to be out there alone.
01:23:48,013 --> 01:23:48,937 Hyuga Roger.
01:23:48,938 --> 01:23:49,938 Misato Status of Unit-01?
01:23:49,939 --> 01:23:51,843 Ritsuko It's being configured for the Dummy System.
01:23:52,174 --> 01:23:53,648 Misato Make it quick!
01:23:57,367 --> 01:24:00,370 Man All of the evacuees are moving into the GeoFront.
01:24:00,371 --> 01:24:04,133 Man They say it's the safest place in the world.
01:24:10,134 --> 01:24:12,472 Aoba Target has entered the GeoFront!
01:24:12,473 --> 01:24:13,473 Hyuga Eva Unit-02, engaging combat!
01:24:13,474 --> 01:24:15,157 Misato Do we have communication with Unit-02?
01:24:15,158 --> 01:24:17,236 Maya The link has been cut.
01:24:18,551 --> 01:24:19,665 Maya That means-
01:24:20,705 --> 01:24:22,539 Misato So, whoever it is wants to go it alone.
01:24:29,256 --> 01:24:31,384 Mari What a wonderful smell...
01:24:31,385 --> 01:24:34,221 Mari Even someone else's Eva doesn't smell bad.
01:24:35,087 --> 01:24:41,143 Mari If I don't attack it swiftly and finish it as soon as it passes the 5th Defense Line, Headquarters will be toast!
01:24:58,187 --> 01:24:59,979 Mari This A.T. Field is really strong!
01:24:59,980 --> 01:25:02,609 Mari I'm not accomplishing a thing here!
01:25:07,488 --> 01:25:09,593 Mari Let's see how you like this!
01:25:21,757 --> 01:25:23,125 Mari Point-blank attack!
01:25:39,125 --> 01:25:41,773 Mari Bastard, what are you...
01:25:41,774 --> 01:25:43,754 Operator Dummy System connections complete.
01:25:43,755 --> 01:25:45,051 Ritsuko Start contact.
01:25:45,052 --> 01:25:46,052 Maya Yes ma'am!
01:25:46,505 --> 01:25:47,053 Ritsuko What's happening?!
01:25:47,254 --> 01:25:48,772 Maya The core unit is refusing the Dummy!
01:25:49,272 --> 01:25:52,602 Maya It's no use! Eva Unit-01 won't activate!
01:25:54,603 --> 01:25:56,454 Fuyutsuki It's refusing the Dummy?
01:25:56,454 --> 01:26:00,883 Gendo Fuyutsuki... I'll leave things to you for a while.
01:26:01,448 --> 01:26:06,096 Mari Damn, I'm not gonna win at this rate...
01:26:06,202 --> 01:26:09,194 Mari Alright! Let's give it a trial run.
01:26:09,946 --> 01:26:13,296 Mari We'll show you the power of an Eva that's abandoned its humanity.
01:26:13,297 --> 01:26:17,965 Mari Invert mode. Secret code, "The Beast"!
01:26:29,177 --> 01:26:31,785 Mari Hang in there, Eva Unit-02...
01:26:32,747 --> 01:26:34,378 Mari I'll suffer with you!
01:26:39,301 --> 01:26:40,683 Hyuga To think the Eva had a function like this...
01:26:40,684 --> 01:26:42,503 Maya The limiters are being released!
01:26:42,504 --> 01:26:43,892 Maya Everything is outside norms!
01:26:43,893 --> 01:26:46,660 Maya Unable to monitor the plug interior! But...
01:26:46,661 --> 01:26:51,043 Ritsuko The plug depth may have reached negative values because she's willing to enter the contamination zone.
01:26:51,044 --> 01:26:53,049 Maya No good! It's too dangerous!
01:26:53,821 --> 01:27:01,411 Mari Nothing... ventured... Nothing...
01:27:03,384 --> 01:27:04,676 Mari Gained!
2.22 ADDITION: 1:28:50 (Mari upside down, she says a few things) Upside down Mari in Eva-02 powers activate! ADD LINES ACCORDINGLY!
01:27:56,639 --> 01:28:02,316 Ritsuko Despite shedding its humanity, and being specialized for combat, the Eva's Second Beast configuration is losing the fight...
01:28:02,351 --> 01:28:04,874 Ritsuko This is as far as we can go.
01:28:06,035 --> 01:28:07,194 Misato Unit-00?
01:28:07,695 --> 01:28:08,195 Misato Without a rifle?
01:28:12,288 --> 01:28:13,197 Ritsuko It can't be...!
01:28:13,198 --> 01:28:15,588 Misato Rei, stop! Rei!
01:28:20,553 --> 01:28:22,380 Rei A.T. Field at maximum!
01:28:25,400 --> 01:28:31,300 Rei Even if Ikari-kun won't pilot Eva, it's alright!
01:28:31,301 --> 01:28:32,087 Rei Therefore...
01:28:44,554 --> 01:28:47,613 Misato The A.T. Field won't break from a single Eva!
01:28:54,760 --> 01:28:59,218 Mari Unit-02... This is it!
01:29:01,778 --> 01:29:03,817 Mari This is the last one!
01:29:12,000 --> 01:29:13,740 Rei Pilot of Unit-02, escape!
01:29:14,241 --> 01:29:15,194 Rei Thank you...
01:29:27,524 --> 01:29:28,817 Hyuga Unit-00 is...
01:29:43,365 --> 01:29:51,949 Tech This shelter has been designated as a hazardous zone. Please evacuate to the nearest safe zone. I repeat...
01:30:00,792 --> 01:30:06,042 Mari Ouch... I almost died out there.
01:30:07,203 --> 01:30:09,936 Mari Ah? What are you doing here?
01:30:09,971 --> 01:30:15,213 Mari I was wondering why we're one unit short. I guess I know now.
01:30:16,944 --> 01:30:19,829 Shinji I... I've decided I'm no longer a pilot.
01:30:21,460 --> 01:30:26,232 Mari So there's another person who worries whether to pilot Eva.
01:30:26,233 --> 01:30:29,951 Mari Then hurry up and run away from here.
01:30:29,960 --> 01:30:32,785 Mari Here, I'll give you a hand.
01:30:36,961 --> 01:30:41,696 Shinji I'm not going to pilot, I'm not going to pilot, I'm not going to pilot...
01:30:42,112 --> 01:30:47,553 Mari You know, if you continue to be so hard on yourself, you won't have any fun.
01:31:30,134 --> 01:31:34,607 Ritsuko It can't be... It's impossible for an Angel to swallow Eva!
01:31:34,641 --> 01:31:38,912 Maya That's strange. The target's identification signal now matches Unit-00's!
01:31:38,913 --> 01:31:42,875 Misato It's over now. If the Angel invades Central Dogma, it won't even self-destruct!
01:31:43,375 --> 01:31:44,916 Misato It will reach Lilith easily!
01:31:44,917 --> 01:31:51,431 Mari It's fusing with Unit-00. It even fused with the pilot.
01:31:51,958 --> 01:31:56,991 Mari You're going to die too. Hurry up and escape!
01:32:07,293 --> 01:32:10,660 Mari Oh, did he leave?
01:32:34,008 --> 01:32:35,500 Tech Headquarters' ground facilities, destroyed!
01:32:35,500 --> 01:32:36,700 Tech Direct hit on the third foundation!
01:32:36,700 --> 01:32:38,370 Hyuga Final armor plating, destroyed!
01:32:38,374 --> 01:32:40,473 Misato It's no good! The main shaft is completely exposed!
01:32:41,883 --> 01:32:43,009 Ritsuko Unit-01's not ready?
01:32:47,038 --> 01:32:48,135 Tech Plug position is not fixed.
01:32:48,136 --> 01:32:50,139 Tech Dummy System is not connected.
01:32:50,140 --> 01:32:51,140 Tech We can't reset!
01:32:51,141 --> 01:32:54,605 Gendo Keep trying. Restart the list from 308.
01:32:54,606 --> 01:32:57,970 Tech List 308, begin checking.
01:32:56,640 --> 01:33:01,290 Gendo Why... Why are you doing this to me, Yui?
01:33:01,006 --> 01:33:02,006 Shinji Please wait!
01:33:03,455 --> 01:33:08,455 Shinji Let me... Please let me pilot Unit-01!
01:33:12,775 --> 01:33:14,728 Gendo Why are you here?
01:33:16,904 --> 01:33:23,813 Shinji Father! I am the pilot of Evangelion Unit-01, Shinji Ikari!
01:33:27,600 --> 01:33:30,389 Aoba Target has descended the first seven layers of Terminal Dogma!
01:33:32,455 --> 01:33:35,026 Misato It's coming here! All noncombatants, evacuate!
01:33:35,070 --> 01:33:39,690 Tech All noncombatants, evacuate immediately. I repeat...

All noncombatants, evacuate immediately.

01:33:50,985 --> 01:33:52,423 Misato Eva Unit-01!
01:33:53,194 --> 01:33:54,253 Misato Shinji-kun!
01:34:17,222 --> 01:34:17,722 Shinji Misato-san!
01:34:17,723 --> 01:34:19,882 Misato Release all fixed locks!
01:34:47,701 --> 01:34:48,702 Shinji Out of energy?
01:34:49,202 --> 01:34:51,128 Maya Unit-01 has reached active time limit!
01:34:51,129 --> 01:34:52,129 Maya The reserves are depleted!
01:34:52,130 --> 01:34:53,130 Misato Shinji-kun!
01:35:10,082 --> 01:35:10,582 Misato Shinji-kun!
01:35:16,419 --> 01:35:20,584 Shinji Give me back... Ayanami!
01:35:23,832 --> 01:35:28,550 Maya It's starting up, even though it should be at its active limit...
01:35:30,231 --> 01:35:31,287 Misato Berserk?
01:35:31,288 --> 01:35:32,498 Ritsuko I don't know...
01:35:32,499 --> 01:35:35,938 Ritsuko I have no idea what is happening to Unit-01.
01:36:21,365 --> 01:36:23,430 Misato An Eva with this kind of power...
01:36:23,431 --> 01:36:26,751 Ritsuko Unit-01 is beyond our ability to control.
01:36:26,752 --> 01:36:29,441 Maya Plug depth is over 180!
01:36:29,476 --> 01:36:30,745 Maya Any further increase is dangerous!
01:36:30,746 --> 01:36:34,077 Ritsuko Shinji-kun, stop! You won't be able to return to human form!
01:36:34,817 --> 01:36:39,534 Shinji I don't care what happens to me. I don't care what happens to the world.
01:36:39,535 --> 01:36:42,050 Shinji But at least Ayanami...
01:36:42,051 --> 01:36:46,450 Shinji At least I will save Ayanami!
01:37:00,116 --> 01:37:01,023 Misato Go for it, Shinji-kun!
01:37:01,028 --> 01:37:01,985 Ritsuko Misato?!
01:37:03,529 --> 01:37:05,278 Misato Don't do this for someone else!
01:37:06,275 --> 01:37:08,766 Misato Do this for your own desires!
01:37:19,996 --> 01:37:21,907 Shinji Ayanami, where are you?
01:37:23,244 --> 01:37:25,244 Rei It's useless.
01:37:25,245 --> 01:37:28,667 Rei I can only live here.
01:37:28,668 --> 01:37:29,411 Shinji Ayanami?
01:37:29,412 --> 01:37:31,780 Rei It's alright, Ikari-kun.
01:37:31,900 --> 01:37:34,440 Rei Even if I die, I can be replaced.
01:37:34.441 --> 01:37:35,630 Rei clones I can be replaced...
01:37:35,659 --> 01:37:38,616 Shinji No! There's no other Ayanami but you!
01:37:39,312 --> 01:37:41,312 Shinji That's why I will save you!
01:38:00,350 --> 01:38:05,425 Maya No, the shape control limiter is going out. Unable to analyze!
01:38:05,426 --> 01:38:10,648 Ritsuko Eva is returning to its original form, no longer confined by man.
01:38:10,649 --> 01:38:16,527 Ritsuko Eva has thrown off the curse we had placed on it, and is becoming a superhuman being close to God.
01:38:16,528 --> 01:38:22,222 Ritsuko It's transforming into an energy-condenser, spinning all of Heaven and Earth,
01:38:22,223 --> 01:38:26,365 Ritsuko all living creatures into it's accompanying giant wave.
01:38:28,061 --> 01:38:33,160 Ritsuko To grant the wishes of a person--that was Eva's only purpose...
01:39:01,701 --> 01:39:03,231 Shinji Ayanami!
01:39:20,700 --> 01:39:22,340 Shinji Ayanami!
01:39:42,990 --> 01:39:45,730 Shinji Ayanami! Take my hand!
01:39:49,600 --> 01:39:51,120 Shinji Come on!
01:40:24,486 --> 01:40:29,977 Kaji Triggering Unit-01's awakening before the rest are present...
01:40:29,978 --> 01:40:34,406 Kaji Commander Ikari, Seele won't keep quiet about this.
01:40:34,407 --> 01:40:39,525 Fuyutsuki As we thought, with those two the awakening of Unit-01 is complete.
01:40:39,526 --> 01:40:45,273 Gendo Indeed. Soon we will consummate our covenant.
01:40:48,710 --> 01:40:53,648 Shinji Ayanami, about my father..., thank you.
01:40:53,649 --> 01:40:58,062 Rei I'm sorry I couldn't do anything.
01:40:58,063 --> 01:40:59,830 Shinji It doesn't matter anymore.
01:41:01,718 --> 01:41:03,045 Shinji It's alright like this.
01:41:10,790 --> 01:41:16,080 Mari Ah, I see. He saved us in the nick of time.
01:41:16,081 --> 01:41:20,327 Mari I knew he smelled different.
01:41:52,617 --> 01:42:02,373 Ritsuko A new lifeform has been born that transcends all reason, at the cost of destroying the life that came before.
01:42:06,151 --> 01:42:11,017 Misato Those wings... Just like 15 years ago!
01:42:12,469 --> 01:42:16,174 Ritsuko Yes. The continuation of Second Impact...
01:42:16,175 --> 01:42:17,175 Ritsuko Third Impact has begun!
01:42:19,035 --> 01:42:21,282 Ritsuko Soon the world will end.
01:47:40,132 --> 01:47:41,997 Misato What the hell was that?
01:47:46,376 --> 01:47:50,304 Kaworu Come now, the promised time has come, Ikari Shinji-kun.
01:47:51,043 --> 01:47:56,240 Kaworu This time, I'll be sure to bring you happiness.
01:48:00,222 --> 01:48:02,943 Misato The frozen Eva Unit-01 with Rei and Shinji still absorbed.
01:48:02,944 --> 01:48:04,541 Misato The fortress city abandoned.
01:48:04,542 --> 01:48:06,035 Misato Nerv personnel held in confinement.
01:48:06,036 --> 01:48:08,722 Misato Eva Unit-06 descends on Dogma.
01:48:08,723 --> 01:48:10,488 Misato The quickening Eva Unit-08 and its pilot.
01:48:12,219 --> 01:48:14,435 Misato And the children chosen by fate finally assemble.
01:48:14,436 --> 01:48:18,852 Misato Where will this tale of people yearning for life continue to go?
01:48:18,853 --> 01:48:21,962 Misato Next time, Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: Q
01:48:21,963 --> 01:48:25,182 Misato I'll give you plenty more fan service next time, too!

 Timestamp Speaker Dialogue 01:10:43,508 --> 01:10:45,884 Shinji Wh-What is this? 01:10:53,593 --> 01:10:55,708 Shinji What are you doing, Father?!  01:10:55,709 --> 01:10:58,984 Maya Control system transfer complete.  01:10:58,985 --> 01:11:05,974 Operator Dummy System has 208 seconds of active time remaining.  01:11:05,975 --> 01:11:09,500 Gendo It doesn't matter. Release the system. Commence the attack. 01:11:40,818 --> 01:11:43,319 Maya Is this the power of the Dummy System? 01:11:43,819 --> 01:11:44,980 Tech Dummy system nominal. 01:11:44,981 --> 01:11:47,050 Tech Control limiters have been rescinded. 01:12:54,529 --> 01:13:00,040 Shinji Why, father... Why... What did you do?! 01:13:02,213 --> 01:13:06,873 Shinji Damn it! Stop it! Stop, stop, stop, stop... 01:13:06,874 --> 01:13:14,905 Shinji Stop, stop, stop, stop...! 01:13:16,483 --> 01:13:17,328 Shinji What's that noise? 01:13:19,813 --> 01:13:20,313 Shinji Stop, don't...! 01:13:23,534 --> 01:13:28,718 Shinji STOP!  01:13:59,322 --> 01:14:00,461 Misato I'm alive? 01:14:03,369 --> 01:14:04,065 Misato Kaji? 01:14:04,960 --> 01:14:06,670 Kaji Thank goodness, Katsuragi. 01:14:07,794 --> 01:14:08,795 Misato How's Ritsuko? 01:14:

960 --> 01:14:06,670 Kaji Thank goodness, Katsuragi. 01:14:07,794 --> 01:14:08,795 Misato How's Ritsuko? 01:14:09,417 --> 01:14:12,429 Kaji Don't worry. She's in better shape than you. 01:14:13,982 --> 01:14:15,304 Misato I see... 01:14:16,576 --> 01:14:18,954 Misato What about Asuka? And Eva Unit-03? 01:14:19,023 --> 01:14:23,500 Kaji It was an Angel. Unit-01 destroyed it. 01:14:33,950 --> 01:14:36,413 Maya Unit-01's interlocking circuit has been cut. 01:14:36,414 --> 01:14:37,414 Fuyutsuki The ejection signal? 01:14:37,415 --> 01:14:40,273 Maya It's blocked from inside the plug. 01:14:40,274 --> 01:14:41,274 Aoba It's not being accepted. 01:14:41,414 --> 01:14:42,275 Hyuga That's enough, Shinji-kun! 01:14:43,276 --> 01:14:45,434 Hyuga   If we hadn't done that, you'd be dead!  01:14:45,435 --> 01:14:48,603 Shinji Don't make me more angry by saying such things.  01:14:49,103 --> 01:14:52,103 Shinji Unit-01 has 285 seconds of active time remaining. 01:14:52,603 --> 01:14:55,444 Shinji That's enough to destroy half of Headquarters.  01:14:55,445 --> 01:14:57,134 Aoba In his current state, he'll do it, too.  01:14:57,169 --> 01:14:59,472 Maya Shinji-kun, listen to us! 01:14:59,473 --> 01:15:03,837 Maya Without Commander Ikari's decision, you would have been killed!  01:15:

59,472 Maya Shinji-kun, listen to us! 01:14:59,473 --> 01:15:03,837 Maya Without Commander Ikari's decision, you would have been killed!  01:15:03,838 --> 01:15:04,838 Shinji I don't care about that. 01:15:05,916 --> 01:15:07,187 Hyuga But it's the truth! 01:15:07,500 --> 01:15:09,898 Shinji I already said I don't care about that! 01:15:10,346 --> 01:15:14,329 Shinji My father... That bastard tried to kill Asuka... 01:15:16,235 --> 01:15:17,235 Shinji With my hands! 01:15:18,298 --> 01:15:19,438 Shinji Why?! 01:15:20,298 --> 01:15:20,798 Shinji Why?! 01:15:21,090 --> 01:15:22,843 Shinji Why did you do that?! 01:15:22,844 --> 01:15:24,680 Shinji Father, you don't understand anything! 01:15:24,681 --> 01:15:28,205 Shinji I believed in you and you made a fool of me! 01:15:28,206 --> 01:15:31,187 Shinji Father, you need to lose somebody important, too! 01:15:31,188 --> 01:15:32,188 Shinji Then you'll understand what I'm feeling! 01:15:33,035 --> 01:15:35,864 Gendo Increase the LCL pressure to maximum. 01:15:36,590 --> 01:15:39,392 Gendo We don't have time to waste on a childish tantrum. 01:15:40,288 --> 01:15:42,092 Shinji I've still got a direct control cir- 01:15:45,550 --> 01:15:50,843 Shinji Damn it... damn it... damn it... 01:16:08,609 --> 01:16:13,616 Rei Ikari-kun, you're always listening to that.  01:16:
